title: ObsiCry
description: 🟣 ObsiCry allows nether portals to be built using any mix of obsidian and crying obsidian. Any combo of crying obsidian and plain obsidian can be used for nether portals.
body:
Obsicry adds the ability for players to create nether portals with both obsidian and crying obsidian blocks. Plain obsidian and crying obsidian can be used in any combination to create nether portals.

![A very large nether portal created with a combination of crying obsidian and regular obsidian blocks. ](https://github.com/wh0oo/ObsiCry/blob/1.21/docs/2025-05-26_09.22.06.png?raw=true)
